coveragePolicy.covered: A focused automated assertion proves the complete row against the frozen legacy path.
coveragePolicy.partial: Automated evidence proves part of the row, but at least one stated expectation remains unasserted.
coveragePolicy.missing: The stable test ID is approved and required, but no accepted automated implementation exists yet.
coveragePolicy.not_applicable: The category cannot arise from this operation; an approved reason is mandatory.
coveragePolicy.approvalMeaning: Approval freezes the required behavior inventory and test mapping. It does not convert partial or missing rows into passing test evidence.

cases.scenario: Admin lists tenant Teachers.
cases.expected: 200 envelope; tenant rows only; active before inactive then name; exact Admin Teacher projection.

cases.reason: The query has no path, query, or body input.

cases.scenario: Unauthenticated request and authenticated Teacher request.
cases.expected: No session returns 401; Teacher receives only their own safe projection without credential fields.

cases.reason: A collection query has no addressed resource and returns an empty collection.
The read has no state transition or conflict precondition.

cases.scenario: Tenant A contains Teachers also visible to a Tenant B actor.
cases.expected: Each actor receives only their tenant rows; Teacher self-scoping remains tenant-bound.

cases.scenario: Teacher list projection dependency fails.
cases.expected: 500 JSON error; no cross-tenant fallback, partial payload, or cacheable response.

cases.scenario: List contains active/inactive Teachers and a Teacher actor.
cases.expected: Stable ordering, exact DTO field set, no pagination, and Teacher credentials omitted for self view.

cases.scenario: Admin reads a tenant Teacher and Teacher reads their own profile.
cases.expected: 200 TeacherProfile; role-safe Teacher projection; groups/hours/upcoming lessons composed with frozen ordering and limit.

cases.reason: The path identifier is opaque and has no syntactic validation.

cases.scenario: Teacher requests their own and another Teacher profile; request has no session.
cases.expected: Own profile succeeds; another Teacher returns 403; missing session returns 401.

cases.scenario: Admin requests a nonexistent Teacher identifier.
cases.expected: 404 Teacher not found.

cases.reason: The read has no state transition or conflict precondition.

cases.scenario: Tenant A actor requests Tenant B Teacher ID with cross-context profile rows present.
cases.expected: 404 and no Teacher, Group, Working Hour, Lesson, credential, or finance data leaks.

cases.scenario: Any profile projection dependency fails.
cases.expected: 500 JSON error; no partial profile is returned.

cases.scenario: Teacher self-profile includes composed Group rows on the frozen legacy path.
cases.expected: Credential fields are absent; current monthlyFee exposure is detected as characterization evidence; groups/hours/lessons preserve frozen ordering and lessons are limited to 20.

cases.scenario: Security-approved target profile is compared with the frozen legacy privacy risk.
cases.expected: Target Teacher self projection omits Group monthlyFee; the intentional compatibility delta is explicit and cannot pass as silent parity.

cases.scenario: Admin creates Teachers without and with portal access.
cases.expected: 201; no User without access; shared Teacher/User ID, Teacher role, branch access, PBKDF2 credential, and active identity with access.

cases.scenario: Required name, employment type, hire date, workload, branch, username, and password inputs are invalid.
cases.expected: Frozen 422 field-specific errors; no Teacher or Identity residue.

cases.scenario: Teacher actor attempts create.
cases.expected: 403 Admin role is required and no rows are created.

cases.reason: Invalid supplied Branch is represented by the frozen 422 validation contract, not 404.

cases.scenario: Portal username already exists.
cases.expected: 409 Username already exists; transaction leaves no orphan Teacher.

cases.scenario: Tenant A creates using Tenant B branch or username context.
cases.expected: Tenant B Branch cannot be used; created Teacher/Identity belongs only to A; same username treatment follows tenant-scoped frozen behavior.

cases.scenario: Failure is injected at each Teacher/Identity/role/branch-access/audit boundary.
cases.expected: 500 according to frozen transport; authoritative rows remain atomic or the exact current non-atomic audit outcome is characterized.

cases.scenario: Create aliases/defaults and unknown fields are exercised.
cases.expected: Stable shared ID, active status, main-branch default, aliases and rounding follow baseline; unknown fields do not persist.

cases.scenario: Admin updates Teacher profile and enabled identity name.
cases.expected: 200 exact Admin Teacher projection and synchronized User name/access outcome.

cases.scenario: Name/profile/access inputs are invalid or access is enabled for inactive Teacher.
cases.expected: Frozen 422 error and no partial Teacher/Identity change.

cases.scenario: Teacher actor or unauthenticated caller attempts update.
cases.expected: 403 or 401 respectively; no mutation.

cases.scenario: Admin updates nonexistent Teacher.
cases.expected: 404 Teacher not found and no identity mutation.

cases.scenario: Update changes portal username to an existing username.
cases.expected: 409 Username already exists; Teacher and Identity remain unchanged.

cases.scenario: Tenant A updates Tenant B Teacher ID or assigns Tenant B Branch.
cases.expected: Foreign Teacher is 404; foreign Branch is 422; no cross-tenant row changes.

cases.scenario: Failure is injected during Teacher/Identity/session/audit updates.
cases.expected: 500 and characterized atomicity; no unapproved split-brain state.

cases.scenario: Omitted, empty, alias, access-disable, and no-password update semantics are exercised.
cases.expected: Clear/preserve/default semantics, session invalidation, exact DTO, and stable Teacher ID match the frozen baseline.

cases.scenario: Admin archives an unassigned active Teacher with portal access.
cases.expected: 200 inactive Teacher; User inactive; sessions invalidated; login denied.

cases.scenario: Ignored request body is malformed or exceeds the parser limit.
cases.expected: 400 or 413 before use-case execution; no mutation.

cases.scenario: Teacher actor or unauthenticated caller attempts archive.
cases.expected: 403 or 401 respectively; Teacher and Identity remain active.

cases.scenario: Admin archives nonexistent Teacher.
cases.expected: 404 Teacher not found.

cases.scenario: Teacher has active Groups or upcoming Lessons.
cases.expected: 409 blocker and no Teacher/User/session mutation; each blocker source is independently proven.

cases.scenario: Tenant A archives Tenant B Teacher ID and cross-tenant blocker rows exist.
cases.expected: 404; no cross-tenant mutation or blocker leakage.

cases.scenario: Failure is injected during Teacher/User/session/audit changes.
cases.expected: 500 and characterized atomicity; no unapproved partially archived identity.

cases.scenario: Teacher with historical lessons but no current blocker is archived.
cases.expected: Historical Teacher references remain unchanged; soft archive never deletes Teacher or history.

cases.scenario: Admin restores inactive Teacher.
cases.expected: 200 active Teacher; Workforce status restored without silently enabling Identity access.

cases.scenario: Ignored request body is malformed or exceeds the parser limit.
cases.expected: 400 or 413 before use-case execution; no mutation.

cases.scenario: Teacher actor or unauthenticated caller attempts restore.
cases.expected: 403 or 401 respectively; no mutation.

cases.scenario: Admin restores nonexistent Teacher.
cases.expected: 404 Teacher not found.

cases.reason: Current restore is repeatable and has no conflict response.

cases.scenario: Tenant A restores Tenant B Teacher ID.
cases.expected: 404 and no cross-tenant status change.

cases.scenario: Teacher restore or audit persistence fails.
cases.expected: 500; current transaction/audit boundary is characterized and no false success is returned.

cases.scenario: Inactive and already-active Teachers are restored.
cases.expected: Teacher ID/history remain stable; result is active; Identity status/access are not implicitly restored.

cases.scenario: Admin resets password for Teacher with portal identity.
cases.expected: 200 success; password rehashed; all sessions invalidated; old password fails and new password works.

cases.scenario: Password is absent, blank, too short, body malformed, or oversized.
cases.expected: Frozen 422, 400, or 413 response and credential/session state unchanged.

cases.scenario: Teacher actor or unauthenticated caller attempts reset.
cases.expected: 403 or 401 respectively; credential and sessions unchanged.

cases.scenario: Teacher does not exist or has no portal identity.
cases.expected: 404 with the frozen Teacher or portal-access message.

cases.reason: Password reset has no current 409 conflict response.

cases.scenario: Tenant A resets Tenant B Teacher ID.
cases.expected: 404 and Tenant B credential/sessions remain unchanged.

cases.scenario: Credential update, session invalidation, or audit persistence fails.
cases.expected: 500 with characterized atomicity; no accepted split between credential and session state.

cases.scenario: Alias and session fan-out are exercised.
cases.expected: newPassword/new_password are equivalent, PBKDF2 format is retained, every active session is invalidated, Teacher profile is unchanged.

cases.scenario: Admin lists tenant hours and Teacher lists own hours.
cases.expected: 200 envelope; Admin tenant rows and Teacher self-only rows; exact nine-field projection.

cases.reason: The query has no path, query, or body input.

cases.scenario: Teacher and unauthenticated callers list hours.
cases.expected: Teacher receives own rows only; missing session returns 401.

cases.reason: A collection query returns an empty collection instead of 404.
The read has no state transition or conflict precondition.

cases.scenario: Both tenants contain Teachers and intervals with colliding references.
cases.expected: No foreign intervals or Teacher names appear for either Admin or Teacher actor.

cases.scenario: Working-hour projection dependency fails.
cases.expected: 500 JSON error and no partial list.

cases.scenario: Rows span Teachers, weekdays, and start times.
cases.expected: Ordering is Teacher name, numeric weekday, then start time; Teacher self filtering and exact DTO stay stable.

cases.scenario: Authorized Admin creates a valid interval.
cases.expected: 201 exact Working Hour projection with tenant, Teacher, branch/default, weekday, and times.

cases.scenario: Teacher ID, weekday, clocks, ordering, active status, or body syntax/size is invalid.
cases.expected: Frozen 422, 400, or 413 response and no interval.

cases.scenario: System Teacher without lessons.manage or unauthenticated caller creates interval.
cases.expected: 403 Permission is required or 401; no interval.

cases.scenario: Teacher ID does not exist in active tenant.
cases.expected: 404 Teacher not found and no interval.

cases.scenario: New same-Teacher/day interval overlaps existing interval; adjacent interval is also checked.
cases.expected: Overlap returns 409 and no row; exact adjacency succeeds.

cases.scenario: Tenant A creates hours for Tenant B Teacher or supplies foreign Branch ID.
cases.expected: Foreign Teacher is 404; current unvalidated Branch behavior is explicitly characterized without enabling data access.

cases.scenario: Overlap read, interval insert, or audit persistence fails.
cases.expected: 500 and no false success; insert/audit boundary and concurrent-overlap behavior are characterized.

cases.scenario: Aliases, main-branch default, unknown fields, multiple days, and boundary times are exercised.
cases.expected: Aliases/defaults match baseline; intervals remain tenant/Teacher scoped and non-overlapping.

cases.scenario: Admin deletes tenant Working Hour.
cases.expected: 200 deleted nine-field projection; interval is absent afterwards.

cases.scenario: Ignored request body is malformed or exceeds the parser limit.
cases.expected: 400 or 413 before use-case execution; interval remains.

cases.scenario: Teacher actor or unauthenticated caller deletes interval.
cases.expected: 403 Admin role is required or 401; interval remains.

cases.scenario: Interval does not exist or is deleted twice.
cases.expected: 404 Working hour not found.

cases.reason: Current deletion has no conflict precondition or 409 response.

cases.scenario: Tenant A deletes Tenant B interval ID.
cases.expected: 404; Tenant B interval remains unchanged.

cases.scenario: Delete or audit persistence fails.
cases.expected: 500 and characterized delete/audit atomicity; no false success.

cases.scenario: Deleted row is mapped without Teacher join.
cases.expected: Returned teacherName is the frozen empty-string quirk; other fields identify exactly the deleted tenant row.

crossCuttingRequirements.scenario: Every operation is invoked without a valid session and under missing/suspended tenant context.
crossCuttingRequirements.expected: 401 or 403 follows the frozen common contract and no operation leaks or mutates data.

crossCuttingRequirements.scenario: Every body-consuming operation receives invalid and oversized JSON.
crossCuttingRequirements.expected: 400 or 413 occurs before use-case execution, including ignored-body archive/restore/delete routes.

crossCuttingRequirements.scenario: Two independent tenant fixtures execute every query and mutation.
crossCuttingRequirements.expected: Identifiers, joins, conflicts, blockers, credentials, sessions, audit facts, and returned DTOs remain tenant-isolated.

knownRisks.decision: Current Teacher self-profile Group monthlyFee exposure is observed but is not approved target behavior. WFT-PROFILE-006 characterizes the legacy risk; WFT-PROFILE-007 must assert the security-approved target omission before target parity can pass.

deferredGates.WF-PRE-11: Target atomicity, retry, compensation, and idempotency semantics remain open.
deferredGates.WF-PRE-13: Test fixtures, target contract suites, parity thresholds, commands, and rollback evidence remain open.

approvals.decision: approved with WF-CONTRACT-RISK-01 blocking target parity
